name: subvibe
description: Subagent delegation marketplace — install agy-plugin (Gemini Flash, lower-intelligence bulk) and/or grok-plugin (Grok Build, stronger reasoning). Choose at install time; if both are installed the conductor routes per task.

plugins.name: agy-plugin
plugins.description: Delegate bulk work to Antigravity/Gemini Flash. Smaller-parameter models — prefer for lower-intelligence / high-volume tasks.

plugins.name: grok-plugin
plugins.description: Delegate bulk work to Grok Build. Prefer when the task needs stronger reasoning than Gemini Flash.
